positive: A mesmerizing celestial mandala composed of interconnected bioluminescent flora and ethereal cosmic dust. The design features stylized phases of the moon, intertwined with crystalline star clusters and vibrant, flowing nebula patterns. Use a central, balanced composition with thick, defined lines for apparel printing. The color palette should be deep indigo and midnight blue, contrasted dramatically with neon turquoise, electric violet, and glowing gold accents. Style is high-contrast, psychedelic line art mixed with smooth watercolor gradients. Focus on clean silhouettes and sharp edges suitable for screen printing. Cinematic volumetric lighting, ultra-detailed, symmetrical, vector illustration style.
